product.title: Squad Dunk
product.description: Squad Dunk is a first-person online basketball game with physics-based mechanics, built around team play, timing and playing with friends from inside the court.
product.history: Squad Dunk reimagines basketball as a first-person online game where players are inside the play rather than watching the sport from above. Control a single player, read the court in real time and work with your squad to create shots, passes, steals and defensive plays. Physics-based shots, passes, and steals make timing, positioning, and teamwork central to every match. The game is not a strict basketball simulation. It is designed to be easy to understand from the first match, with readable action, low downtime, and a skill curve built around movement, coordination, and physical ball control.

features.feature: FIRST-PERSON BASKETBALL: Play basketball from inside the court. Instead of managing a full team from a distant camera, you control one player directly in first person and experience every pass, steal, shot, and defensive play from your own perspective.

PHYSICS-BASED BALL CONTROL: Shots, passes, steals, and rebounds are shaped by physical interaction with the ball. Timing, angle, movement, and positioning matter, making each successful play feel readable and earned.
TEAM PLAY: Squad Dunk is built around playing with friends online. Move into space, call for the ball, make the extra pass, defend together, and turn individual actions into coordinated team plays.

EASY TO START, FUN TO IMPROVE: Squad Dunk is designed to be accessible from the first match. Players can quickly understand what is happening, while still finding room to improve through movement, timing, team coordination, and ball control.
SCHOOL-COURT ENERGY: Squad Dunk is inspired by the feeling of playing basketball with friends after class: quick to understand, social, competitive, and built around that "one more game" feeling.

product.short-description: Squad Dunk is a first-person online basketball game with physics-based mechanics, built around team play, timing and playing with friends from inside the court.

long-descriptions.long-description: Squad Dunk reimagines basketball as a first-person online game where players are inside the play rather than watching the sport from above. Control a single player, read the court in real time and work with your squad to create shots, passes, steals and defensive plays. Physics-based shots, passes, and steals make timing, positioning, and teamwork central to every match.

The game is not a strict basketball simulation. It is designed to be easy to understand from the first match, with readable action, low downtime, and a skill curve built around movement, coordination, and physical ball control.

key-feature.title: FIRST-PERSON BASKETBALL
key-feature.body: Play basketball from inside the court. Instead of managing a full team from a distant camera, you control one player directly in first person and experience every pass, steal, shot, and defensive play from your own perspective.

key-feature.title: PHYSICS-BASED BALL CONTROL
key-feature.body: Shots, passes, steals, and rebounds are shaped by physical interaction with the ball. Timing, angle, movement, and positioning matter, making each successful play feel readable and earned.

key-feature.title: TEAM PLAY
key-feature.body: Squad Dunk is built around playing with friends online. Move into space, call for the ball, make the extra pass, defend together, and turn individual actions into coordinated team plays.

key-feature.title: EASY TO START, FUN TO IMPROVE
key-feature.body: Squad Dunk is designed to be accessible from the first match. Players can quickly understand what is happening, while still finding room to improve through movement, timing, team coordination, and ball control.

key-feature.title: SCHOOL-COURT ENERGY
key-feature.body: Squad Dunk is inspired by the feeling of playing basketball with friends after class: quick to understand, social, competitive, and built around that "one more game" feeling.

media-video.title: Pre-release Gameplay Reel
media-video.label: Private press preview
media-video.description: Private press preview. Link coming soon.

manifest-screenshot.title: First-person possession
manifest-screenshot.alt: First-person basketball possession on a colorful school court.

manifest-screenshot.title: Shot at the hoop
manifest-screenshot.alt: First-person shot attempt toward the basketball hoop.

manifest-screenshot.title: Made basket
manifest-screenshot.alt: Basketball going through the hoop during first-person gameplay.

manifest-screenshot.title: Defender pressure
manifest-screenshot.alt: Opposing player applying pressure on the court.

manifest-screenshot.title: Team setup
manifest-screenshot.alt: Multiplayer team setup on the Squad Dunk court.

manifest-screenshot.title: Shot preparation
manifest-screenshot.alt: First-person player preparing a basketball shot.

manifest-screenshot.title: Under-rim play
manifest-screenshot.alt: Close play under the basketball rim.

manifest-screenshot.title: Jump play
manifest-screenshot.alt: Player jumping during an energetic basketball play.

team.boilerplate: Katapult Games is a small video game studio based in Berlin, Germany. The team is developing Squad Dunk, a first-person, physics-based basketball game focused on online team play, readable action, and playful sports energy.
